title: feat(theme): add dark mode support
description:
Adds dark mode toggle functionality using React Context.

## Changes
- Created ThemeContext with darkMode state
- Added toggleTheme function for switching modes
- Wrapped app in ThemeProvider

## Testing
- Verified toggle works in UI
- Checked persistence across page reloads

title: fix(api): add auth headers and error handling
description:
Fixes API calls to include authentication and proper error handling.

## Problem
API calls were failing silently without auth headers.

## Solution
- Added Bearer token to all requests
- Created ApiError class for typed errors
- Added response status checking

## Breaking Changes
None - error handling is additive.

title: feat(conversations): add pagination controls
description:
Adds query-based pagination to conversation listing.

## Changes
- Supports limit and offset query parameters
- Defaults to a larger page size for faster browsing
- Preserves existing API shape for callers that do not pass params

## Testing
- Verified first page loads
- Verified offset pagination returns distinct records

title: fix(sync): replace naive polling with bounded retry
description:
Improves a fragile polling loop by limiting retries and backing off between attempts.

## Why
The previous loop could run forever and hammer the API.

## What Changed
- Added retry cap
- Added exponential backoff
- Kept behavior deterministic for failure recovery

title: refactor(ui): add safe defaults for optional props
description:
Improves component resilience by providing fallback values for optional props.

## Why
Some render paths omitted title/subtitle fields and caused blank headings.

## What Changed
- Added default title fallback
- Added empty-string subtitle fallback
- Kept rendering logic simple

title: feat(profile): show save confirmation toast
description:
Adds a success toast after profile updates complete.

## Changes
- Displays confirmation after save
- Keeps existing update flow intact
- Improves user feedback for async mutation

diff:
-return items.filter(Boolean);
+return items.filter((item): item is Item => item !== null);
title: fix(types): narrow nullable array results
description:
Uses a type predicate to preserve TypeScript narrowing after filtering nullable array entries.

## Benefits
- Stronger type safety
- Cleaner downstream code
- Avoids manual casts

title: feat(auth): persist session in centralized store
description:
Moves session persistence into the auth store to simplify login flows.

## Changes
- Centralized token handling
- Updated login flow to use auth store action
- Reduces duplicated localStorage logic

## Testing
- Confirmed token survives refresh
- Verified logout clears session

title: fix(pagination): guard against negative page indexes
description:
Prevents invalid pagination requests from sending negative or zero-based indexes into the API.

## Changes
- Added early return for invalid page values
- Preserved behavior for valid pages
- Makes the client more defensive against bad input

title: fix(logging): handle varied payload shapes
description:
Normalizes message payloads across webhook variants and logs the resolved message field.

## Problem
Several webhook payloads used `message` instead of `msg`.

## Solution
- Support both field names
- Log structured data for easier debugging
- Keep fallback text for unknown payloads
